message.content:
# Mobile App Voice Room UI Design Analysis

## 1. Color Scheme (Hex Codes)

**Background Colors:**
- Primary background: `#1a1f3a` (dark navy blue)
- Secondary background (chat area): `#2a2f4a` (slightly lighter navy)
- Bottom input area: `#252b45` (dark navy with subtle variation)

**Card/Container Colors:**
- User info card: `#2d3557` (medium navy)
- Chat message bubble: `#3a4270` (lighter navy)
- Announcement banner: `#4a5278` (light navy)
- Microphone buttons: `#3a4270` (navy with transparency)

**Text Colors:**
- Primary text: `#ffffff` (white)
- Secondary text: `#b8c5e0` (light blue-gray)
- Accent text: `#ffd700` (gold)
- Announcement text: `#ffe066` (light gold)

**Accent Colors:**
- Microphone active state: `#4caf50` (green)
- Microphone muted state: `#f44336` (red)
- Interactive elements: `#ffd700` (gold)
- Notification badge: `#ff4444` (bright red)

## 2. Layout Structure

**Top Section:**
- Status bar with time (top-left)
- User profile card (top-center) with avatar, ID, and verification badge
- Action buttons (top-right): menu (three dots) and power (circular)

**Middle Section:**
- Microphone grid (5 positions, 2 rows)
- Chat message area with user messages and system notifications
- Announcement banner below chat

**Bottom Section:**
- Input area with text field and voice button
- Navigation bar with 4 icons (right-aligned)

**Right Sidebar:**
- Floating action buttons (vertical stack)
- User avatar with name
- Activity icon with notification badge
- Message icon
- Music icon

## 3. Component Styling

**User Profile Card:**
- Rounded rectangle with subtle shadow
- White text on dark background
- Small circular avatar (40px diameter)
- Verification badge (gold circle with checkmark)
- ID text in smaller font

**Microphone Buttons:**
- Circular shape (60px diameter)
- Dark navy background with subtle border
- Microphone icon in center
- Number labels below each button
- Hover/active states with color changes

**Chat Messages:**
- Bubble-style containers with rounded corners
- User avatars (small circular)
- Message text with emoji support
- Timestamp or user name indicators

**Announcement Banner:**
- Semi-transparent dark background
- Edit icon (pencil)
- Placeholder text for customization

**Input Area:**
- Dark rounded rectangle
- Text field with "Say something" placeholder
- Voice button (microphone icon)
- Game controller and gift icons (right side)

**Floating Action Buttons:**
- Circular shape with icons
- Gradient backgrounds (purple to pink)
- Subtle shadows
- Spaced evenly vertically

## 4. Typography

**Font Families:**
- Primary: Sans-serif (likely Roboto or similar)
- Secondary: Clean, modern sans-serif

**Font Sizes:**
- Header text: 18-20px (bold)
- Body text: 14-16px (regular)
- Small text: 12px (regular)
- Input placeholder: 14px (light)

**Font Weights:**
- Bold for headers and important elements
- Regular for body text
- Light for secondary information

**Text Styling:**
- White text on dark backgrounds
- Subtle letter spacing for readability
- Consistent line height across elements

## 5. Icons/Badges

**Icons:**
- Microphone (various states: active, muted, idle)
- User avatar (circular with border)
- Verification badge (gold circle with checkmark)
- Edit icon (pencil)
- Voice input (microphone)
- Game controller
- Gift box
- Activity (trophy or star)
- Message (chat bubble)
- Music (note or speaker)

**Badges:**
- Notification counter (red circle with white number)
- Verification badge (gold with white checkmark)
- Status indicators (online/offline dots)

**Icon Styling:**
- White or gold color scheme
- Consistent size (24-32px)
- Rounded corners where applicable
- Subtle shadows for depth

## Additional Visual Elements

**Background:**
- City skyline silhouette
- Purple gradient (darker top, lighter bottom)
- Star-like sparkles for ambiance

**Borders/Shadows:**
- Subtle shadows on cards and buttons
- Rounded corners throughout (8-12px radius)
- Thin borders on interactive elements

**Spacing:**
- Generous padding between elements
- Consistent margin patterns
- Hierarchical spacing (more space for important elements)

This design follows a dark theme with purple/blue accents, creating a modern, immersive voice chat experience with clear visual hierarchy and intuitive navigation.
